tools.name: accounts.completeRegistration
tools.description: Completing a registration e.g. for invited users. Finish registration with a username and a password.

tools.name: accounts.getAllOrganizationRoles
tools.description: Listing users and their roles in a paginated manner.

tools.name: accounts.getUsersOfOrganization
tools.description: Finding users in the specified organization in a paginated manner.

tools.name: accounts.requestPasswordReset
tools.description: Requesting a reset for a new password.

tools.name: accounts.verifyPasswordReset
tools.description: Setting a new password and verifying the request to set the password.

tools.name: alias.addGuidAlias
tools.description: Adds or replaces aliases for single ID4ns (alias type item and mapp) or groups of ID4ns (alias types gtin, ean and article)

tools.name: alias.getGuidAliases
tools.description: Looks up the alias for each alias type (group and single) and returns a map of all aliases found.

tools.name: alias.getGuidAliasTypes
tools.description: Retrieve this list to find out all alias types to use with alias search and change operations

tools.name: alias.removeGuidAlias
tools.description: Remove the alias of the given type

tools.name: apiKeys.createNewApiKey
tools.description: Creation of a new API key.

tools.name: apiKeys.getApiKey
tools.description: Showing the details of an API key.

tools.name: apiKeys.listAllApiKeyPrivileges
tools.description: Listing all possible API key privileges.

tools.name: apiKeys.listAllApiKeysOfOrganization
tools.description: Finding all API key assigned to the specified organization in a paginated manner.

tools.name: apiKeys.listId4ns
tools.description: Listing ID4ns of a id4n concerning privilege

tools.name: apiKeys.updateApiKey
tools.description: API keys can be updated with new labels, and be activated and deactivated. The secret or UUID cannot be changed.

tools.name: auditing.listOrganizationChangeLog
tools.description: Listing change log entries of the specified organization id.

tools.name: billing.getPositionsForOrganization
tools.description: Get billing positions for a given organization

tools.name: billing.getSumForOrganization
tools.description: Get billing amount of services for a given organization

tools.name: collections.deleteProperties
tools.description: Partial deletion of id4n properties. If the property does not exist, it will be ignored.

tools.name: collections.getAllCollectionsOfOrganization
tools.description: Retrieving all collections of an organization in a paginated manner. You may filter the results by specifying id4n properties with filter operations (eq, in, ne) in the query parameters. e.g. `com.yourcompany.orderId.eq=1234`

tools.name: collections.getMultipleProperties
tools.description: Get a list of ID4n properties for the specified ID4ns.

tools.name: collections.getProperties
tools.description: List all properties of an id4n.

tools.name: collections.patchProperties
tools.description: Partial updating of id4n properties. If a property contains a null value the property will be deleted other values will be saved and overwritten if they already exist.

tools.name: collections.updateCollection
tools.description: Update collection changing only the given values

tools.name: guids.createGuid
tools.description: Creating one or more GUIDs with a specified length.

tools.name: guids.getCollections
tools.description: Retrieving all owned or holding collections the specified id4n is assigned to.

tools.name: guids.getGuidsWithoutCollection
tools.description: Retrieve GUIDs not in any collection

tools.name: guids.getId4n
tools.description: Retrieving basic information about an ID like the type and the creation time.

tools.name: guids.importGS1Codes
tools.description: Importing GS1/MAPP codes that contain unique components.

tools.name: history.filteredList
tools.description: Lists the history of a GUID

tools.name: history.list
tools.description: DEPRECATED - please use filteredList with organization parameter to achieve the same functionality

tools.name: messaging.enqueueCustomMessage
tools.description: Enqueue a custom organisation message with custom data.

tools.name: organizations.addPartnerOrganization
tools.description: Adding a partner organization. If the given organization is already a partner the result will be state 200 too.

tools.name: organizations.getOrganizationPrivileges
tools.description: Listing all privileges of the current user/APIKey of the specified organization.

tools.name: organizations.getPartnerOrganizations
tools.description: Listing partners in a paginated manner.

tools.name: organizations.setOrganizationLogo
tools.description: Updating an organization logo using a multipart file upload.

tools.name: publicServices.getPublicDocument
tools.description: Retrieve a public document (meta-data only, no content)

tools.name: publicServices.getRoutes
tools.description: Retrieve all public routes for a GUID

tools.name: publicServices.go
tools.description: Forwarding to the designated route defined in the routing,

tools.name: publicServices.listAllPublicDocuments
tools.description: Listing all public documents of an id4n

tools.name: routing.getAllRoutes
tools.description: Retrieve all routes of a GUID (or ID4N)

tools.name: routing.getRoute
tools.description: Retrieve current route of a GUID (or ID4N)

tools.name: storage.createDocument
tools.description: The documents' mime type is suggested on octet-stream data. Otherwise the specified content mime type is used.

tools.name: storage.getDocument
tools.description: Retrieve a document (meta-data only, no content)

tools.name: storage.listAllDocuments
tools.description: Listing all documents of an id4n

tools.name: storage.listDocuments
tools.description: Listing documents of an id4n seen by a specified organization

tools.name: storage.putDocument
tools.description: Creating or overwriting an existing document

tools.name: transfer.receive
tools.description: Taking ownership can be forbidden by a previous owner. See methods prepare and getInfo

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
